title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 329.265 - Cosmetologists may be licensed as esthetician
text:
329.265.  Cosmetologists may be licensed as esthetician. — After July 1, 1999, any licensed cosmetologist shall be required to complete the required training of seven hundred fifty hours and pass the required examination to be licensed as an esthetician.
(L. 1995 S.B. 292, A.L. 1996 S.B. 930, A.L. 1998 H.B. 1601, et al., A.L. 2005 S.B. 280)
